name: stickerTweaks
title: Sticker Tweaks
description: Tweaks to sticker display and appearance

colourEmojis.name: Fix unsupported emojis
colourEmojis.tooltip: Replaces the default system emoji set with Noto Color Emoji, fixing any emojis that your system does not natively support.

outline.name: Solid sticker outlines
outline.tooltip: Adds a contrasting solid outline to stickers.

arranged.name: Neat stickers
arranged.tooltip: Overrides default sticker placement entirely in favour of neatly arranging them along the bottom edge of each post.
